## LazyItem class

A lazily-materialized item backed by a base value.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class LazyItem<TKey extends string = string, TBase = unknown, TValue = unknown> 
```

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `LazyItem` class.
